title: Medianet Adapter Params
description: A schema which validates params accepted by the Medianet adapter

cid.description: The customer id provided by Media.net.

crid.description: The placement id provided by Media.net.

region.description: Optional Media.net geolocation code used to route the bid request to a regional datacenter (USE: US East, USW: US West, APAC: Asia, EUC: Europe Central). When omitted, the default endpoint is used.
